criteria.criterion: `_prune_queue_events` no longer runs a raw unlocked `git rm` / whole-index `git commit`; routes through the locked, pathspec-scoped `event_append.delete_events`.
A regression test reproduces the race (RED before fix) and passes after: concurrent locked writes + drain-queue prune leave zero dropped/stranded events.

citation.description: search_files for 'git commit' in src/rebar *.py shows only event_append.py (locked path), git_adapter.py (engine reconciler, not store writes), and purge_bridge.py; purge_bridge.py's raw commit is identified in ticket comment as filed separately as grassgreen-clotty-duck with lower exposure (manual operator command), satisfying the 'or is justified' clause.

criteria.criterion: A sibling sweep confirms no other unlocked `git commit` store-write remains outside the locked path (or is justified).

citation.description: Second ticket comment: 'Gerrit change 743 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/743): Verified=+1 AND LLM-Review=+1 (PASS, 2 advisory non-blocking), 0 unresolved. All CI jobs green on the recheck run: CI(ubuntu py3.11/3.12/3.13), CI(macos py3.13), golden-path(clean install)... Submitted -> status MERGED; landed on origin/main as commit 9938a8aab.'

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass — CI's `Verified` gate green on the landed change (external CI state; attested by a comment citing the change + vote + merge).
